Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Blazor Dashboard & Real-Time Monitoring
Content:
The Blazor Server dashboard (WebUI.Blazor) provides real-time agent visibility via REST endpoints and SignalR. The dashboard is the primary human interface for monitoring the agent.

## Architecture

The Blazor app hosts:
- REST API (/api/agent/*, /api/goals/*, /api/tools/*)
- SignalR Hub (/hubs/monitor)
- AgentBackgroundService (IHostedService)
- All in one process — no separate queue, database, or broker

## REST Endpoints

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
|----------|--------|--------|
| /api/agent/status | GET | Current agent state (goal, connection, inventory, position) |
| /api/agent/plan | POST | Set a goal: {goalName, parameters} |
| /api/agent/stop | POST | Stop agent (?emergency=true for emergency stop) |
| /api/agent/command | POST | Execute arbitrary action |
| /api/goals | GET | List available goal types |
| /api/goals | DELETE | Cancel current goal |
| /api/tools | GET | List all registered tools with schemas |
| /about | GET | Dashboard about page |

## Dashboard Push (AgentBackgroundService)

AgentBackgroundService pushes updates to dashboard consumers via:

PushStatusToDashboardAsync (called periodically):
- Publishes AgentStatusModel: connection status, current goal, position, health, food, inventory summary

PushChatToDashboardAsync (called on chat events):
- Publishes chat messages with username, message, timestamp

PushGoalToDashboardAsync (called on goal changes):
- Publishes goal state: name, phases, completion status, failure reason

## SignalR Hub

The SignalR hub (/hubs/monitor) provides real-time streaming of agent state without polling. Dashboard components subscribe to hub methods for:
- StatusUpdate: periodic agent status snapshot
- ChatMessage: in-game chat relay
- GoalUpdate: goal lifecycle events
- LogEntry: structured log messages

## Dashboard Components (WebUI.Blazor/Components/)

- AgentStatusPanel: connection status, health, food, position, game mode
- GoalTracker: current goal, phases, progress
- InventoryPanel: current inventory contents
- ChatLog: real-time chat display
- ToolConsole: command input and tool execution history
- ActionLog: dispatched actions with status

## Update Frequency

- Status push: every 1-2 seconds (configurable)
- Chat/Goal/Log push: event-driven (immediate on occurrence)
- SignalR reconnection: automatic with retry

## Sprint Planning

Sprint 41-42 work items related to dashboard:
- TSK-0041: Dashboard contracts snapshot models
- TSK-0042: Dashboard event bus
- TSK-0043: Dashboard snapshot store
- TSK-0044: Dashboard broadcast service
- TSK-0045: Refactor AgentBackgroundService to event bus
- TSK-0046: SignalR event normalization

These are part of the ongoing dashboard improvement effort to decouple dashboard publishing from the main agent loop.
